name: Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Roma tomatoes, peeled and seeded
1 lb New potatoes, unpeeled; cut into 1-inch cubes
1/4 lb Green beans, trimmed and sliced diagonally
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tomatoes into small pieces and set aside.
2. In a large saucepan, sauté butter and onion for 3-4 minutes.
3. Add chicken broth and water to the pan.
4. Tie together the bay leaf, oregano sprigs, parsley sprigs, and lemon zest with string, and add them to the pan along with the tomatoes, carrots, potatoes, celery, salt, and pepper.
5. Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat, then reduce to low heat and cover. Cook for 20 minutes.
6. Remove the herb bundle from the soup.
7. Add the yellow corn kernels and green beans and zucchini to the soup.
8. Simmer, covered, for an additional 15 minutes.
9. Taste and adjust seasonings as needed, then serve immediately.
